commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer-label handling, contributor real behavior proof, and green CI; there is no narrow automation repair indicated by the current diff review.; Cleared: The diff stays within Telegram code, tests, and changelog, adds no dependencies or workflow changes, and shows no concrete security or supply-chain regression. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Telegram token-keyed throttler helper, wires polling bots and ad hoc send clients to reuse one grammY API throttler per bot token, adds focused tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main installs a throttler on polling bots but builds ad hoc send clients without installing one, so same-token callers do not share one quota gate. I did not run a live Telegram quota test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer-label handling, contributor real behavior proof, and green CI; there is no narrow automation repair indicated by the current diff review.
